compressed_prompt:
Titan makes clothing for large men. Write an advertisement for the company that would appeal to a wide audience. Make sentences short. Your response should not contain any comma.
Titan makes clothing for large men. Craft an ad appealing to a broad audience. Keep sentences concise. No commas in the text.
response: Titan makes great clothes for big guys. We have shirts and pants in all sizes. Our clothes are comfortable and stylish. We fit men of all shapes. Titan is the perfect choice for the modern man. Our clothes are made to last. We have bold designs and classic styles. Titan is for men who want to look great. Visit our store today. Get the best clothes for the big and tall man. Titan is your one stop shop.
